notes: Per-user config dashboard (user/index.html): opening a subscription link in a browser shows a friendly page — per-app QR + copy + one-tap 'Add to app' (Hiddify, v2rayNG, FlClash/Clash Meta, sing-box/NekoBox, Karing, Streisand) + copy-subscription, bilingual Farsi/English with light/dark; apps still get their config directly. Plus Smart IP — per-operator clean IPs auto-served from a central GitHub pool. Carries the 3.8.1 worker features (real-time quota cutoff, optional non-TLS mode, version/update indicator) and everything from 3.8.0.
